diff --git a/tests/test_parser.py b/tests/test_parser.py
--- a/tests/test_parser.py
+++ b/tests/test_parser.py
@@ -8,3 +8,10 @@ def test_parse_ok():
     assert parse("42") == 42
+
+def test_parse_leading_plus():
+    assert parse("+42") == 42
+
+def test_parse_leading_space():
+    assert parse(" 42") == 42
